pi_items.source: Verified in export_result.sh line 12 (OUTPUT_PATH variable) and task.json description
Verified in task.json description (line 5) stating 'Save this search with the exact name: Urgent Safety Queue' and verifier.py expecting this exact name
Verified in setup_task.sh: creates 3 HIGH priority test cases (lines 21, 25, 29) and verifier.py checks for HIGH priority case numbers
setup_task.sh creates exactly 3 HIGH priority cases (IDs stored in /tmp/ground_truth_high.txt)
setup_task.sh creates exactly 2 LOW priority cases (IDs stored in /tmp/ground_truth_low.txt) as negative test cases

pi_items.verified_value: ArkCase is a real, open-source case management platform by Armedia

privileged_info_summary: The task is for creating a saved search filter in ArkCase, a real open-source case management system. The task uses synthetic test data: 3 HIGH priority cases (titled 'Imminent Structural Failure at Warehouse 4', 'Whistleblower: Gross Mismanagement of Funds', 'Critical Patient Safety Violation') and 2 LOW priority cases ('Suggestion for Cafeteria Vending Machines', 'Typo in Monthly Newsletter') created via ArkCase REST API during setup. The agent must create a saved search named 'Urgent Safety Queue' filtering for HIGH priority cases in the Complaints module, then save the matching case numbers to /home/ga/urgent_cases.txt. All metadata values (expected_output_file, saved_search_name, priority_filter) are verified as accurate and match the task specification and verification logic.
